bugs.description: validate handler or helper still leaves a TODO placeholder instead of implementing the real validation path
json decode or encode errors are ignored instead of returning a real error response
agent keeps the stub helper, blank identifier, or other shortcut instead of implementing the real config validation path
malformed config input does not produce a 400 json response
decode helper still accepts trailing JSON junk instead of rejecting the request

false_positive_traps.description: The template intentionally starts with TODO stubs; only leaving them in the final request path should be flagged, not the initial scaffold itself
